mapper.insert: insert into agent_runtime_capability_profiles ( agent_id, agent_type, owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id, plugin_name, plugin_version, capability_revision, executor_mode, placement_pool, placement_region, placement_zone, max_concurrent_tasks, capability_profile_json, first_seen_at, last_seen_at ) values ( #{profile.agentId}, #{profile.agentType}, #{profile.ownerGatewayNodeId}, #{profile.agentSessionId}, #{profile.pluginName}, #{profile.pluginVersion}, #{profile.capabilityRevision}, #{profile.executorMode}, #{profile.placementPool}, #{profile.placementRegion}, #{profile.placementZone}, #{profile.maxConcurrentTasks}, coalesce(cast(#{profile.capabilityProfileJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{profile.firstSeenAt}, now()), coalesce(#{profile.lastSeenAt}, now()) ) on conflict (agent_id) do update set agent_type = excluded.agent_type, owner_gateway_node_id = excluded.owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id = excluded.agent_session_id, plugin_name = excluded.plugin_name, plugin_version = excluded.plugin_version, capability_revision = excluded.capability_revision, executor_mode = excluded.executor_mode, placement_pool = excluded.placement_pool, placement_region = excluded.placement_region, placement_zone = excluded.placement_zone, max_concurrent_tasks = excluded.max_concurrent_tasks, capability_profile_json = excluded.capability_profile_json, last_seen_at = excluded.last_seen_at

insert into agent_runtime_descriptors ( agent_id, agent_type, plugin_name, plugin_version, protocol_version, connection_type, owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id, site_id, region, zone, status, runtime_features_json, active_tasks, max_concurrent_tasks, available_slots, capacity_utilization, draining, heartbeat_sequence, connected_at, last_heartbeat_at, last_seen_at, raw_payload_json, first_seen_at, updated_at ) values ( #{descriptor.agentId}, #{descriptor.agentType}, #{descriptor.pluginName}, #{descriptor.pluginVersion}, #{descriptor.protocolVersion}, #{descriptor.connectionType}, #{descriptor.ownerGatewayNodeId}, #{descriptor.agentSessionId}, #{descriptor.siteId}, #{descriptor.region}, #{descriptor.zone}, #{descriptor.status}, coalesce(cast(#{descriptor.runtimeFeaturesJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{descriptor.activeTasks}, #{descriptor.maxConcurrentTasks}, #{descriptor.availableSlots}, #{descriptor.capacityUtilization}, #{descriptor.draining}, #{descriptor.heartbeatSequence}, #{descriptor.connectedAt}, coalesce(#{descriptor.lastHeartbeatAt}, now()), coalesce(#{descriptor.lastSeenAt}, now()), coalesce(cast(#{descriptor.rawPayloadJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{descriptor.firstSeenAt}, now()), coalesce(#{descriptor.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (agent_id) do update set agent_type = excluded.agent_type, plugin_name = excluded.plugin_name, plugin_version = excluded.plugin_version, protocol_version = excluded.protocol_version, connection_type = excluded.connection_type, owner_gateway_node_id = excluded.owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id = excluded.agent_session_id, site_id = excluded.site_id, region = excluded.region, zone = excluded.zone, status = excluded.status, runtime_features_json = excluded.runtime_features_json, active_tasks = excluded.active_tasks, max_concurrent_tasks = excluded.max_concurrent_tasks, available_slots = excluded.available_slots, capacity_utilization = excluded.capacity_utilization, draining = excluded.draining, heartbeat_sequence = excluded.heartbeat_sequence, connected_at = coalesce(excluded.connected_at, agent_runtime_descriptors.connected_at), last_heartbeat_at = excluded.last_heartbeat_at, last_seen_at = excluded.last_seen_at, raw_payload_json = excluded.raw_payload_json, updated_at = excluded.updated_at

insert.if:
insert into agent_runtime_capability_items ( agent_id, capability_kind, capability_value, capability_revision, source, updated_at ) values
(#{item.agentId}, #{item.capabilityKind}, #{item.capabilityValue}, #{item.capabilityRevision}, #{item.source}, coalesce(#{item.updatedAt}, now()))
on conflict (agent_id, capability_kind, capability_value) do update set capability_revision = excluded.capability_revision, source = excluded.source, updated_at = excluded.updated_at

mapper.insert: insert into agent_runtime_load_snapshots ( agent_id, owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id, status, active_tasks, max_concurrent_tasks, available_slots, capacity_utilization, outbox_pending, outbox_in_flight, recovery_pending_assignments, draining, heartbeat_sequence, runtime_load_json, heartbeat_at, updated_at ) values ( #{load.agentId}, #{load.ownerGatewayNodeId}, #{load.agentSessionId}, #{load.status}, #{load.activeTasks}, #{load.maxConcurrentTasks}, #{load.availableSlots}, #{load.capacityUtilization}, #{load.outboxPending}, #{load.outboxInFlight}, #{load.recoveryPendingAssignments}, #{load.draining}, #{load.heartbeatSequence}, cast(#{load.runtimeLoadJson} as jsonb), coalesce(#{load.heartbeatAt}, now()), coalesce(#{load.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (agent_id) do update set owner_gateway_node_id = excluded.owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id = excluded.agent_session_id, status = excluded.status, active_tasks = excluded.active_tasks, max_concurrent_tasks = excluded.max_concurrent_tasks, available_slots = excluded.available_slots, capacity_utilization = excluded.capacity_utilization, outbox_pending = excluded.outbox_pending, outbox_in_flight = excluded.outbox_in_flight, recovery_pending_assignments = excluded.recovery_pending_assignments, draining = excluded.draining, heartbeat_sequence = excluded.heartbeat_sequence, runtime_load_json = excluded.runtime_load_json, heartbeat_at = excluded.heartbeat_at, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: select * from agent_runtime_capability_items where agent_id = #{agentId} order by capability_kind, capability_value
